title: This slushie machine was a lifesaver during NYC’s heat wave
summary: The new Ninja Slushi Twist machine provided a convenient at-home solution during NYC's recent heat wave, allowing users to make frozen drinks without leaving their home. The device builds on the original model's popularity and offers a practical alternative to store-bought slushies during extreme weather.
content: Last weekend’s brutal NYC heat wave had me craving a frozen drink almost every afternoon. Normally, that would mean sweating through a walk to 7-Eleven for a slurpee. This time, though, I stayed home and put the new Ninja Slushi Twist to the test. Ninja’s latest slushie machine builds on the popularity of the original […]

zh.title: 在纽约热浪期间，这台冰沙机是一个救星
zh.summary: 新的Ninja Slushi Twist机器在纽约最近的热浪期间提供了方便的家中解决方案，允许用户在不离开家的情况下制作冻饮。该设备以原始型号的受欢迎程度为基础，在极端天气期间提供了商店购买冰沙的实用替代品。

title: After years of teasing, the viral Nopia synth is ‘basically finished’
summary: After years of anticipation since its 2023 announcement, the Nopia synthesizer from creators Martin Grieco and Rocío Gal is nearing launch, expected within the coming months at approximately £550. The instrument features a unique design that blends multiple modules including keys, bass, arp, and pad into a unified performance interface without traditional knob-based synthesis.
content:
More mint green synths please. | Image: Nopia	

After setting the music gear corner of the internet on fire back in 2023 with the first glimpse at the Nopia, creators Martin Grieco and Rocío Gal are almost ready to bring it to market. The duo brought it to the MusicRadar offices for an in-depth first look and revealed that it will be launching in "a couple of months" for around £550.
Nopia is built around harmonic interplay in a unique way. Rather than a few knobs and a keyboard controlling a single synth patch, it blends multiple modules - keys, bass, arp, and pad - into a single performance, not unlike a drumless groovebox. There's a one-octave keyboard called the Chord Builder, a 12-b …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 多年预告后，病毒式的Nopia合成器"基本上已完成"
zh.summary: 自2023年宣布以来，经过多年的期待，来自创作者Martin Grieco和Rocío Gal的Nopia合成器即将推出，预计在未来几个月内推出，价格约为550英镑。该乐器采用独特设计，将包括键、贝斯、arp和垫子在内的多个模块融合到统一的性能界面中，无需传统的基于旋钮的合成。

title: Oregon’s Attorney General withdraws effort to delay Paramount and Warner Bros. merger
summary: Oregon Attorney General Dan Rayfield withdrew his request for documents and effort to delay the Paramount and Warner Bros. Discovery merger after the company refused to comply. The AG had sought a 60-day delay to review the deal, but has now dropped his civil investigative demand. The decision allows the merger to proceed without further state-level obstruction.
content:
Oregon Attorney General Dan Rayfield had been seeking documents from Paramount related to its takeover of Warner Bros. Discovery. Rayfield also asked a state circuit court judge to delay the closing of the deal by 60 days so that his office could review the documents. But according to Deadline and Variety, he's now dropped his civil investigative demand for the records.
Obviously, Paramount is pleased with Rayfield's decision to withdraw his request, but the AG's office isn't exactly satisfied with the outcome.
Jenny Hansson, communications director for Rayfield, told Deadline that, "Paramount made it clear that they weren't going to compl …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 俄勒冈州司法部长停止延迟派拉蒙和华纳兄弟合并的努力
zh.summary: 俄勒冈州司法部长丹·雷菲尔德在公司拒绝配合后，撤回了其索取文件和延迟派拉蒙与华纳兄弟探索公司合并的请求。该司法部长曾寻求60天的延迟来审查该交易，但现已放弃其民事调查要求。这一决定允许合并在没有进一步州级阻挠的情况下进行。

title: Smart glasses without a camera? Even Realities bets productivity beats recording everyone
summary: Even Realities is releasing smart glasses designed for productivity rather than recording, targeting professionals in meetings, presentations, and travel situations. The company prioritizes functionality over surveillance capabilities in its device design. The approach reflects a different philosophy than camera-equipped smart glasses that have raised privacy concerns.
content: The glasses are targeted at people who might be constantly in meetings, giving presentations, and traveling to countries where different languages are spoken.

zh.title: 没有摄像头的智能眼镜？Even Realities押注生产力胜过录制所有人
zh.summary: Even Realities发布了专为生产力而非录制设计的智能眼镜，目标是针对会议、演示和旅行中的专业人士。该公司在其设备设计中优先考虑功能而非监视能力。这种方法反映了与配备摄像头的智能眼镜不同的理念，后者引发了隐私问题。

title: FL Studio head Constantin Koehncke turns to Reddit for feedback and fun
summary: Constantin Koehncke, CEO of Image Line and head of FL Studio digital audio workstation, is engaging with the Reddit community for feedback and collaboration. FL Studio has recently introduced AI-powered features including stem separation and a Gopher chatbot assistant. Koehncke previously led Native Instruments before joining Image Line in 2022.
content:
If you're a music maker of a certain age, then you probably once dabbled with a pirated copy of a little app called Fruity Loops. These days it's called FL Studio, and Constantin Koehncke, is the man responsible for shepherding the pioneering digital audio workstation (DAW) through the modern age. As CEO of Image Line, the company behind FL Studio, Constantin has overseen the introduction of a number of AI-powered features like stem separation and its Gopher chatbot.
Before taking the reins of Image Line in 2022, Constantin was the head of Native Instruments, where he spearheaded the shift towards digital services, did a stint in marketing, …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: FL Studio负责人康斯坦丁·科恩克求助于Reddit寻求反馈和乐趣
zh.summary: Image Line首席执行官兼FL Studio数字音频工作站负责人康斯坦丁·科恩克正在与Reddit社区互动以获得反馈和协作。FL Studio最近推出了包括干扰分离和Gopher聊天机器人助手在内的人工智能驱动的功能。科恩克在2022年加入Image Line之前曾领导Native Instruments公司。

title: Nintendo’s Talking Flower got a small price cut
summary: Nintendo's Talking Flower toy from Super Mario Bros. Wonder received a $5 price reduction, dropping from $34.99 to $29.99 at major retailers. The toy provides hourly affirmations and temperature-based commentary but lacks microphone and internet connectivity. Users report mixed reactions, with many enjoying the quirky charm despite its limited practical utility.
content:
If you’re the type of person who could always use a little extra positive affirmation, or you have a weakness for weird gadgets, the Talking Flower might be of interest. I’m only kind of serious. The toy is based on a character from Super Mario Bros. Wonder that guides Mario through levels with quippy, whimsical remarks. It’s a little weird that it even exists, but, then again, this is the company that made Alarmo.
The Talking Flower debuted for $34.99, but it got a small price reduction at Amazon and Walmart. It’ll instead cost you $29.99 to buy the cute talking toy. 
Nintendo Talking Flower

Where to Buy:

 $34.99 $29.99 at Amazon
 $34.99 $29.99 at Walmart

The Talking Flower doesn’t have much utility. Unlike the $110 Alarmo, it can’t serve as an alarm even though it asks when you go to bed and wake up (so that it knows when to keep quiet). It’s there to call out every passing hour when you’re awake, and to say random stuff unprompted. It can make comments about the general time of day, as well as the temperature thanks to its built-in thermometer. The Talking Flower lacks a microphone, and it doesn’t connect to the internet. However, it has a button that’ll make it say things, if you don’t want to wait for it to randomly blurt out its pre-programmed thoughts. Like in the video game, you can select the language it speaks.
My colleague Andrew Webster went hands-on with the Talking Flower, and his takeaway was that it’s a drip feed of whimsy. However, it would occasionally say something that reminded Andrew to take care of himself, whether it be to slow down and relax or to take a lunch break. I’m entertained by many reviews on Amazon, which highlight that buyers are split on being annoyed with the Talking Flower, but loving it anyway — just like the character in Wonder.

zh.title: 任天堂的会说话花朵获得小幅降价
zh.summary: 任天堂的会说话花朵玩具从$34.99降价至$29.99。该玩具每小时提供鼓励性语言和基于温度的评论,但缺乏麦克风和互联网连接。用户反应不一,许多人欣赏其独特魅力,尽管实用性有限。

title: White House taps the guy who keeps crying ‘aliens’ to run UFO group
summary: Harvard astrophysicist Avi Loeb has been appointed to head the White House's UAP Science Advisory Council, tasked with investigating unidentified anomalous phenomena. The Council brings together scientists from diverse disciplines including physics, pathology, computer science, and philosophy. Loeb's appointment has drawn attention given his public advocacy for considering extraterrestrial explanations for unexplained phenomena.
content:
Harvard astrophysicist Avi Loeb will head the UAP Science Advisory Council established by the White House, the Pentagon, the Office of the Director of National Intelligence, the FBI, and "the intelligence community." The Council will provide scientific reports and advice to the UAP Governing Board, in an effort to "resolve the nature of UAP," or unidentified anomalous phenomena.
On paper, Loeb's qualifications seem strong. And he's surrounded himself with a team from a variety of backgrounds. The Council includes not only physicists, but a pathologist, a computer scientist, a philosopher, a psychologist, and even the founding publisher of S …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 白宫任命频呼外星人的学者领导不明飞行物调查小组
zh.summary: 哈佛天体物理学家艾维·洛布被任命领导白宫不明异常现象科学咨询委员会。该委员会汇聚了来自物理学、病理学、计算机科学和哲学等多个领域的科学家。洛布的任命因其公开倡导考虑不明现象外星起源而备受关注。

title: OpenAI bets on families as ChatGPT goes deeper into households
summary: OpenAI is hiring a dedicated product manager to develop ChatGPT experiences tailored for families, caregivers, and older adults. The initiative signals OpenAI's expansion strategy beyond traditional users toward household and multigenerational use cases. The move reflects growing efforts to integrate AI assistants into diverse family roles and demographics.
content: ChatGPT is hiring a dedicated product manager to build experiences for families, caregivers, and older adults, according to a job posting.

zh.title: OpenAI押注家庭市场,ChatGPT深入家庭生活
zh.summary: OpenAI正在聘请产品经理开发针对家庭、护理人员和老年人的ChatGPT体验。这一举措标志着OpenAI超越传统用户的扩展战略,面向家庭和多代际使用场景。该举措反映了将AI助手融入多样化家庭角色和人口群体的努力。

title: ICE are heavily armed killers. They’re also huge losers
summary: The Trump DHS faces scrutiny over federal agents' use of deadly force in immigration enforcement and ICE's monitoring of online criticism, raising questions about agency accountability.
content:
Federal agents patrol the halls of immigration court at the Jacob K. Javits Federal Building in December 2025. | Photo by Michael Nigro/Pacific Press/LightRocket via Getty Images	

Donald Trump's Homeland Security regime has been at the center of two critical stories in the past two weeks. In the first, federal agents shot and killed a man and quickly got to work justifying the use of force under the flimsiest of pretenses. In the other, it made house calls to people who said mean things to them online.
Since taking office last year, the Trump administration has been telling us that fighting the good fight of white supremacy will make you look cool and noble. The DHS under former Secretary Kristi Noem spent $220 million to help her cosplay as a cowboy railing against immigrants and call up ICE recruits as if we're fig …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: ICE是武装的杀手。他们也是失败者
zh.summary: Trump政府DHS因联邦特工在移民执法中使用致命武力以及ICE监控网络批评而受到审查，引发了关于机构问责的问题。

title: A Jupiter-size planet that escaped its star's death
summary: Astronomers discovered a Jupiter-sized exoplanet that survived its parent star's red giant phase, though the mechanism for its escape remains unexplained.
content: It's unclear how the planet avoided its star's bloated red giant stage.

zh.title: 逃脱恒星死亡的木星大小行星
zh.summary: 天文学家发现了一颗在其母恒星红巨星阶段幸存下来的木星大小系外行星，但其逃脱机制仍然不明确。

title: A tasty RPG that will make you very hungry
summary: Dosa Divas is a compact RPG delivering an epic narrative in under 10 hours, balancing sweeping storytelling with personal character drama through distinctive visual design.
content:
Roleplaying games are often defined by excess. Storylines that span dozens of hours, side quests so big they could be their own game, massive worlds that require complex maps to explore, and casts so big you start forgetting character names. That's part of what makes these games feel like epic adventures, but it can also make them intimidating, particularly if you have limited spare time. Dosa Divas, on the other hand, manages to capture much of that same feeling in a package that spans less than 10 hours. And it does it with a bold sense of style and a story that seamlessly flits between big themes and personal drama. There's just one big d …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 一款美味的RPG游戏会让你很饿
zh.summary: Dosa Divas是一款紧凑的RPG游戏，在10小时内呈现宏大的叙事，通过独特的视觉设计平衡恢宏的故事讲述与个人角色戏剧。

title: The perfect kit for all your tiny repairs
summary: The Verge's Installer column recommends practical repair tools and curated entertainment picks, including commentary on current media and tech culture trends.
content:
Hi, friends! Welcome to Installer No. 135, your guide to the best and Verge-iest stuff in the world. (If you're new here, welcome, crank the AC, and also you can read all the old editions at the Installer homepage.) 
This week, I've been reading about cold plunges and Colson Whitehead and the food truck mafia, finally getting to the theater to see Obsession, watching The Agency because it's apparently everyone's favorite underrated show, nodding sadly to Adam Conover's video about the death of sitcoms, making a lot of noises during the Dune: Part Three trailer, testing Atlas as a visual journal, giggling endlessly at the new InfoWars, and s …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 所有微小修缮的完美工具包
zh.summary: The Verge的Installer专栏推荐了实用的修缮工具和精心挑选的娱乐内容,包括对当前媒体和科技文化趋势的评论。

title: Overhaul of public lands grazing regulations seeks to cut public involvement
summary: The Bureau of Land Management is revising its public lands grazing regulations for the first time since 1995, with potential reductions to public participation in rule-making.
content: For the first time since 1995, the Bureau of Land Management is rewriting its grazing regulations.

zh.title: 公共土地放牧规定改革力求减少公众参与
zh.summary: 土地管理局自1995年以来首次修订公共土地放牧规定,可能会减少公众在规则制定过程中的参与机会。

title: Are you filthy enough for a $700 portable shower?
summary: Portable showers like the $700 Hottap Go address the hygiene challenges of outdoor enthusiasts camping, overlanding, and vanlifing. With a 12-liter integrated tank and no need for external containers, it offers a feasible luxury alternative for remote locations.
content:
A luxurious hot shower anywhere you go.	

Hot showers, like electricity, are a luxury that's easy to take for granted. That all changes after a few nights camping at a music festival, a week toiling at a backcountry job site, or overlanding all summer in the great unknown. An itchy scalp and the vague smell of warm clams suddenly make the idea of spending hundreds on a portable shower seem less absurd. 
I've been testing the Hottap Go from Australia-based Joolca while vanlifing to shower after surfing and to wash up after cooking. It features a 12L integrated water tank which is an improvement on other portable showers that require an external container and long, cumbersome hose th …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 价值700美元的便携式淋浴真的值得吗？
zh.summary: 便携式淋浴如700美元的Hottap Go解决了露营、越野旅行和房车旅行爱好者的卫生问题。配备12升集成水箱，无需外部容器，为偏远地区提供了切实可行的奢侈替代方案。

title: US cybersecurity agency CISA had to build its incident playbook during the incident, agency reveals
summary: CISA employee at a contractor exposed passwords in a public GitHub repository, forcing the agency to develop its incident response playbook reactively during the breach. This reveals critical gaps in cybersecurity preparedness even at the nation's top cybersecurity agency.
content: Independent cybersecurity journalist Brian Krebs reported in May that a security researcher with cyber firm GitGuardian alerted him to reams of exposed passwords stored in a publicly accessible GitHub repository, which an employee of a CISA contractor had uploaded.

zh.title: 美国网络安全机构CISA在事件期间被迫构建事件应对手册，该机构披露
zh.summary: CISA承包商员工在公共GitHub仓库中泄露密码，迫使该机构在违规期间被动地制定事件应对手册。这暴露了即使是美国顶级网络安全机构在网络安全防范方面的关键缺陷。

title: Phia accused of ‘cookie stuffing,’ taking affiliate credit on purchases it didn’t earn
summary: Phia, a shopping startup founded by Bill Gates' daughter Phoebe, faces allegations of "cookie stuffing"—deceptively claiming credit for sales it didn't facilitate. The practice allowed the company to fraudulently receive affiliate commissions, according to a Bloomberg investigation.
content: Phia, the shopping startup founded by Bill Gates’ daughter, Phoebe, and her friend Sophia Kianni is under fire for a practice known as “cookie stuffing,” which helped the product receive commissions and credit for sales it did not actually generate, per a Bloomberg investigation.

zh.title: Phia被指控"Cookie填充"欺诈，对未促成的购买申报联盟链接信用
zh.summary: 由比尔·盖茨女儿菲比创立的购物初创公司Phia面临"Cookie填充"指控——欺骗性地宣称对其未协助的销售有贡献。根据彭博社的调查，这种做法使该公司能够欺诈性地获得联盟佣金。

title: No, Flock isn’t threatening people for debating surveillance
summary: After a cease and desist letter surfaced, Flock Safety faced backlash over surveillance practices, though the letter wasn't actually threatening people for discussing its work. The incident reflects broader concerns about Flock's partnerships with law enforcement.
content:
On Thursday, the Instagram account for a lecture series in Newport Beach, CA posted a photo of what appeared to be a cease and desist letter from the surveillance technology company Flock Safety. Flock has received significant backlash over its technology and work with law enforcement agencies, and this letter kicked off yet another wave of criticism against the company for allegedly trying to shut down discussions of its work.
"WE WILL NOT BE SILENCED," the group, The Saturday Salon, wrote in the Instagram post, which has more than 3,000 likes. A separate post about the letter on Bluesky has more than 360 reposts. The text of the letter de …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 不，Flock并未因讨论监控而威胁人们
zh.summary: 在一份终止函曝光后，Flock Safety因其监控做法面临强烈反对，尽管该函实际上并未因人们讨论其工作而威胁他们。这一事件反映了对Flock与执法部门合作的更广泛担忧。
